sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n10172" key="a)ntime/teimi" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντιμέτ-ειμι</orth>, (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">εἶμι</foreign> <sense id="n10172.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ibo</tr_>) <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">compete with</tr_> others: <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">οἱἀντιμετιόντες</quote_> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">rival competitors,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Comp.Arist.Cat.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
